Title: Document Upload (Invoice + Proof against PO)
Functional Flow: Agency logs in → sees list of POs received from SAP (via Story #20 PO Auto-Dispatch) → selects a PO to raise a FAP claim → system blocks duplicate invoice submission for the same PO → Agency uploads 5 mandatory document types against the selected PO: (1) Invoice, (2) Element-wise Cost Summary, (3) Activity Summary, (4) Photo Proofs (multiple upload), (5) Enquiry Dump. Each document is uploaded into its mapped field (no classification needed). On upload, Document Intelligence extracts fields and displays them inline (read-only). E.g., Invoice upload shows: Invoice Number, Invoice Amount, GSTIN. Photos support batch upload. PO is NOT uploaded — it comes from SAP. Submit button enables when all 5 mandatory types are present. On submit → background validations (Story #3) → scoring → recommendation.

2. [CRITICAL] Add duplicate-PO guard — block re-submission for same PO
3. [CRITICAL] Remove PO upload — PO comes from SAP

6. [TASK] Add Enquiry Dump as mandatory document type

Title: Document Data Extraction (No Classification)
Functional Flow: Classification is NOT required — documents are uploaded into their mapped fields already (Invoice → Invoice slot, Cost Summary → Cost Summary slot, etc.). On upload, Azure Document Intelligence reads the document and extracts structured fields. Extracted data is stored in ExtractedDataJson and displayed inline on the upload page (read-only). Fields per type: Invoice (Agency Name/Address, Billing Name/Address, State, Invoice Number, Date, Vendor Code, PO Number, GST#, GST%, HSN/SAC, Amount). Cost Summary (Place of Supply, Element-wise Cost, Days, Activations, Teams, Quantity, Total Cost). Activity Summary (Dealer/Location, Days per location). Photos (Date via EXIF, Lat/Long via EXIF, Blue T-shirt detection, 3W Vehicle detection via AI Vision). Enquiry Dump (State, Date, Dealer Code/Name, District, Pincode, Customer Name/Number, Test Ride).
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Remove document classification logic — not needed
2. [CRITICAL] Update DocumentAgent to extract-only (no classify step)
3. [CRITICAL] Show extracted fields inline on Agency upload page (currently only on ASM review)
4. [TASK] Update extraction prompts for all 5 doc types with exact field lists
5. [TASK] Add EXIF extraction for Photos (Date, GPS) via MetadataExtractor
6. [TASK] Add AI Vision analysis for Photos (blue t-shirt, 3W vehicle)
7. [VERIFY] Test extraction accuracy with real samples per doc type

Title: Validation (Background after Submit)
Functional Flow: Validations run in background after Agency submits. Two categories: (A) Presence — required fields must exist, (B) Cross-checks — values must match across documents and backend data. INVOICE (14 checks): Presence of Agency Name/Address, Billing Name/Address, State, Invoice#, Date, Vendor Code, PO#, GST#/%, HSN/SAC, Amount. Cross-checks: GST# vs State mapping, HSN/SAC match, Invoice Amount ≤ PO Amount, GST% vs State (default 18%). COST SUMMARY (10): Presence of Place of Supply, Element Cost, Days, Activations, Teams, Quantity. Cross-checks: Total Cost ≤ Invoice Amount, element costs vs state rates, fixed/variable cost limits. ACTIVITY (3): Presence of Dealer/Location. Cross-check: Days vs Cost Summary days. PHOTOS (5): Presence of Date, Lat/Long, Blue T-shirt, 3W Vehicle. Cross-check: Photo count = man-days in Activity; Activity days ≤ Cost Summary days (3-way). ENQUIRY DUMP (9): Presence of State, Date, Dealer Code/Name, District, Pincode, Customer Name/Number, Test Ride. UI shows per-document status: 'Invoice - Validation In Progress' → 'Invoice - Validation Completed' with field-level results.

2. [CRITICAL] Build reference data tables: GST-State mapping, HSN/SAC codes, state-wise cost rates
3. [CRITICAL] Implement 3-way cross-validation: Photos ↔ Activity man-days ↔ Cost Summary days

Title: Confidence Score Calculation
Functional Flow: After extraction completes → ConfidenceScoreService calculates weighted score. PO is NOT a factor (comes from SAP). New weights: Invoice 30%, Cost Summary 20%, Activity 20%, Photos 30%. Total = 100%. Score range 0-100. If score <70 → flagged for mandatory ASM review. Score displayed on Agency dashboard and ASM review page with color indicators (green >85%, amber 70-85%, red <70%).
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Update weights: Invoice 0.30, CostSummary 0.20, Activity 0.20, Photos 0.30
2. [CRITICAL] Remove PO from confidence calculation entirely
3. [TASK] Remove PoConfidence field from scoring logic (keep in DB for backward compat)
4. [TASK] Update ConfidenceScore entity — add EnquiryDumpConfidence if needed or exclude from scoring
5. [VERIFY] Test score calculation with new weights
6. [VERIFY] Test edge case: what happens if a doc type scores 0?

Title: Approval Recommendation (Short Summary)
Functional Flow: After validation + scoring → RecommendationAgent generates recommendation: APPROVE / REVIEW / REJECT. The recommendation summary must be very short — approximately 2 lines or ~100 characters max. Example: 'All validations passed. Confidence 92%. Recommend approval.' Stored in Recommendation entity. Displayed on ASM review page.
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Enforce ~100 character limit on recommendation evidence text
2. [TASK] Update RecommendationAgent prompt to generate concise 2-line summaries
3. [TASK] Update frontend recommendation_card.dart to display compact summary
4. [VERIFY] Test that generated summaries stay within ~100 chars
5. [VERIFY] Test all three recommendation types (APPROVE/REVIEW/REJECT) produce short summaries
Clarification Questions:
1. Should the 100-char limit be a hard cutoff or a guideline?
2. Should the summary include the confidence score number?

Title: Email Communication (PO PDF + Status Emails)
Functional Flow: Two email scenarios: (A) When a PO arrives from SAP into the system → system generates a PO PDF document → emails the PO PDF to the Agency as an attachment. Agency can also download the PO PDF from the portal UI. (B) Status emails: validation fail → email Agency with fields needing correction; ASM approves/rejects → email Agency with status update. All emails sent via Azure Communication Services (ACS) with retry (3x exponential backoff).

1. [CRITICAL] Build PO PDF generation service (QuestPDF) — triggered when PO arrives from SAP

5. [TASK] Configure ACS connection and sender email
6. [VERIFY] Test PO PDF email delivery with attachment
7. [VERIFY] Test all status email scenarios
Clarification Questions:

3. PO PDF template — any specific Bajaj format?

Title: Notification Management (Push for New PO)
Functional Flow: When a new PO arrives in the system (from SAP) → push notification sent to the Agency (not dealer — same role) so they know a new PO is available for invoice submission. Also: in-app notifications for submission status changes (ASM approve/reject, RA approve/reject). Notification bell with unread count in app bar. Mark-as-read on click.
